value_chain_position: Precision motion control systems manufacturer for aerospace, defense, and industrial applications — electromechanical actuators, controls, and fluid management systems embedded in aircraft, missiles, and space vehicles.
relative_comps: Moog competes with Woodward and TransDigm in defense/aerospace precision actuation. Revenue CAGR of 8% and FCF margin of ~5% are below peer quality — TransDigm (TDG) extracts far superior economics from similar positioning via aggressive aftermarket pricing. Moog's growth re-accelerated YoY (14%) on defense budget expansion but the 3-year CAGR of 8% makes the defense_tech disruption narrative strained. The business is a qualified Tier 1 supplier, not a software-defined disruptor.
